title: The Best Apps EverMusic

author: Zhicheng86
title: The Ultimate Cloud Music Player
content: Evermusic is an outstanding music player for iOS! The app’s ability to sync music from multiple cloud services and organize my library seamlessly is a game-changer. The sound quality is exceptional, and the interface is intuitive and sleek. Highly recommended for anyone who wants their music everywhere they go!

author: Seanlwx10
title: Can’t fast forward songs
content: For some reasons I can’t fast forward songs that are newly downloaded , everytime I wanted to skip the song to a part I want , it won’t happen and it straight away skip the song to the next song…it won’t happen to the old songs that I downloaded long ago, just new songs that I downloaded after the update I think….I’m not sure is this an update or what but if it’s a bug pls fix it cause I really like this music player a lot..

author: john117462
title: Fix issues
content: Your music app has been great so far. The only problem is that with the recent update, when i edit the song's album cover and title that song is now unplayable. I'm not sure where the bug was coming from but i hope you can figure it out and fix it

author: Xiu Yong
title: Doesn’t work perfectly in Carplay
content: I love the EQ work nicely on my CarPlay, do plan to buy the Pro version. However this issue is stopping me to get pro due to the file loading for iPod library in CarPlay is quite slow, and also the playlists in iPod library won’t show out in CarPlay too.

author: felix ✿
title: bugs
content:
hello there, i've been using you app for a few months now, might be almost a year and lately, i found bugs in your app.

1. the app didnt show play controller that appears at the lockscreen. therefore, i cant pause or play next from outside of the app neither with my headphone
2. the app wouldnt playback. it would play one song and then stop. 
3. it always crashed

i hope you will solve this problems. thank you very much.
